content:
AAA.003 → AAA.003.1 (Inserted Later) → AAA.004

📌 LEVEL 5 (MODULES)

✅ Letter 1 = Previous module’s first letter, +1.
✅ Letter 2 = Same as Letter 1.
✅ Letter 3 = Same as Letter 1.
✅ Universal number continues from the last module.
✅ If past ZZZ, transition to ZZZ.AAA.

📌 Examples:

AAA.001 → BBB.016 → CCC.031 → … → ZZZ.226 → ZZZ.AAA.227 → ZZZ.AAB.228

📌 LEVEL 4 (MAJOR SECTIONS)

✅ Letter 1 = Same as first letter from the last snapshot.
✅ Letter 2 = Third letter from the last snapshot, +1.
✅ Letter 3 = Third letter from the last snapshot, +1.

📌 Examples:

ZZZ.200 → ZAA.201
PPP.110 → PQQ.111
FFF.046 → FGG.047
BBB.016 → BCC.017

📌 LEVEL 3 (SUBSECTIONS)

✅ Letter 1 = Same as first letter from the last snapshot.
context: From document: 📜 FINALIZED RULES FOR THE NAMING STRUCTURE & UNIVERSAL SYSTEM — chunk 2 (chunk 2/6)
